content: Apex Heating and Air, this is Sarah, how can I help you today?
Hi, my AC's been running all morning but the house just won't cool down. It's 81 degrees in here.
Oh no, that's miserable in this heat. Is the system blowing air at all, or completely not working?
It's blowing, but the air isn't cold. Feels close to room temperature.
Got it. That usually points to a refrigerant or compressor issue. Roughly how old is the system?
I think about eight years? It came with the house.
Okay, eight years. And is this a central AC unit?
Yeah, central air. There's the big unit outside.
Perfect. Have we serviced your system before, or is this your first time with us?
First time. I just found you online.
Happy to help. I can get a tech out today between 2 and 5 PM, or tomorrow 8 to 11 AM. Which works better?
Today would be amazing, it's really hot in here.
You got it. Today, 2 to 5. Can I grab your name and the service address?
It's Mike Reynolds, 4412 Bayshore Boulevard, Tampa.
Thanks Mike. And the best phone number to reach you?
Perfect, you're all set. Our diagnostic fee is 89 dollars, and the tech will give you a full estimate on-site. He'll text you 30 minutes before he arrives. Thanks for calling Apex, Mike!
